a.content: Marko will review the GDPR risk register by Friday.
a.source: Marko took the GDPR risk register — review due Friday.

b.content: Marko will review the vendor risk register by Friday.
b.source: Marko also owns the vendor risk register review, same Friday deadline.

notes: FALSE-MERGE TRAP (weight 2): one word apart — two different registers, two obligations. The designed near-miss.
